mapper.sql: FROM projects p INNER JOIN teams te ON te.id = p.team_id INNER JOIN team_members tm ON tm.team_id = te.id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks t INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = t.project_id INNER JOIN teams te ON te.id = p.team_id INNER JOIN team_members tm ON tm.team_id = te.id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} AND t.assignee_id = #{userId} AND UPPER(REPLACE(COALESCE(t.status, ''), '-', '_')) IN ('TODO', 'IN_PROGRESS')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks t INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = t.project_id INNER JOIN teams te ON te.id = p.team_id INNER JOIN team_members tm ON tm.team_id = te.id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} AND t.assignee_id = #{userId} AND UPPER(REPLACE(COALESCE(t.status, ''), '-', '_')) = 'DONE' AND t.created_at >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, COALESCE( ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN UPPER(REPLACE(COALESCE(t.status, ''), '-', '_')) = 'DONE' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(t.id), 0) ), 0 )::INTEGER AS progress, p.status, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM projects p INNER JOIN teams te ON te.id = p.team_id INNER JOIN team_members tm ON tm.team_id = te.id LEFT JOIN tasks t ON t.project_id = p.id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.description, p.status, p.created_at ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.status, COALESCE(u.name, '미지정') AS assigneeName, t.priority, t.due_date AS dueDate, p.id AS projectId FROM tasks t INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = t.project_id INNER JOIN teams te ON te.id = p.team_id INNER JOIN team_members tm ON tm.team_id = te.id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = t.assignee_id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
